stimulus:
[Bar graph: US States with the Greatest Number of Vineyards in 2018. Six bars; vertical axis 0–2,800.]

  • California: 2,500
  • Washington: 950
  • Oregon: 720
  • New York: 470
  • Texas: 410
  • Virginia: 280

The graph shows the number of vineyards in six states in 2018. For instance, in 2018 ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the text?

answerOptions.content: Virginia and Texas each had between 1,200 and 1,400 vineyards.

rationale:
Choice C is correct because the graph shows Oregon at about 720 vineyards, which falls between 600 and 800.

Choice A is incorrect: Oregon had about 720 vineyards, fewer than 1,000. Choice B is incorrect: New York had about 470, below 600. Choice D is incorrect: Virginia (280) and Texas (410) are both well under 1,200.
